scenarios.name: Control panel shows speed slider and Run button

steps.text: the control panel should be visible
the Step button should be visible
the speed slider should be visible
the simulation tick delay display should show 1
the Run button should show Run

scenarios.name: Set simulation tick delay on speed slider

steps.text: I set simulation tick delay to <delay>
the simulation tick delay display should show <delay>

scenarios.name: Run toggles to Stop while simulation is running

steps.text: I click Run
simulation run should be active
the Run button should show Stop
I click Stop
simulation run should be stopped
the Run button should show Run

scenarios.name: Running simulation advances time on timer ticks

steps.text: a diagram model with stock Stock1 at 100 100
stock Stock2 at 300 200
flow Flow1 runs from stock Stock1 to stock Stock2
I set simulation tick delay to 0
I click Run
<ticks> simulation run ticks elapse
the simulation time display should show <time>
simulation run should be active
a diagram model with stock Stock1 at 100 100
I set simulation tick delay to 0
I click Run
2 simulation run ticks elapse
I click Stop
3 simulation run ticks elapse
the simulation time display should show 0.2
simulation run should be stopped

scenarios.name: Step still advances time while run is stopped

steps.text: I click Step 1 times
the simulation time display should show 0.1
